data.title: Moo Moo Express Car Wash Partners with Johnson's Real Ice Cream to Celebrate Lewis Center Grand Opening on March 25
data.description: Express Wash Concepts (EWC), a leading express car wash operator in the nation, revealed on March 25, 2026 in Columbus, Ohio, that its popular brand Moo Moo Express Car Wash is teaming up with Johnson's Real Estate. EWC is known for its rapid growth and strong reputation in the industry.

data.title: Echo Global Logistics Completes Acquisition of ITS Logistics, Expanding Integrated Full Supply Chain Solutions
data.description: The recent acquisition has bolstered Echo's supply chain and AI-driven logistics offerings, solidifying its position as a major player in the industry. With a combined revenue forecasted to reach $5.2 billion in 2025, the move signifies significant growth and potential for the company. Headquartered in Chicago, Echo Global Logistics, Inc. stands out as a top-notch provider of transportation solutions powered by cutting-edge technology.

data.title: TBL Team Boxing League Announces Hall of Fame Broadcaster Al Bernstein Joins as Lead Analyst
data.description: Renowned boxing commentator Al Bernstein, a Hall of Fame broadcaster, is set to lend his wealth of experience to TBL Team Boxing League ("TBL") as the lead analyst for the upcoming season. The announcement was made in New York on March 25, 2026. Bernstein's addition is expected to enhance the broadcast quality, with his decades of expertise bringing a new level of insight to the TBL matches.

data.title: Kick Off Spring and Dive Into Clean: Prep Your Pool and Lawn Now for a Stress-Free Season with Aiper
data.description: This spring, Aiper is offering homeowners the chance to revamp their entire backyard setup, from opening the pool to enhancing lawn care. The Aiper Experts Duo and IrriSense 2 are currently on sale with exclusive discounts at Aiper.com and as part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale Event. The promotion is ongoing till [date].

data.title: Architect Financial Technologies Partners with MarketVector Indexes to Launch Interest Rate Perpetual Futures on AX
data.description: Architect Financial Technologies Inc. (referred to as Architect) has recently teamed up with MarketVector Indexes™ to launch the financial industry's inaugural exchange-traded perpetual futures based on interest rate benchmarks. This groundbreaking partnership was officially disclosed on March 25, 2026, in Chicago. The collaboration aims to introduce a novel financial product that will revolutionize the trading landscape. This initiative marks a significant milestone in the industry by offering investors an innovative opportunity to engage with perpetual futures tied to interest rate benchmarks.

data.title: HighTechLending and Better Expand Access to Home Equity Loans Through EquitySelect™ HELOC
data.description: In Irvine, California on March 25, 2026, HighTechLending, a nationwide mortgage lender specializing in creative consumer solutions, revealed a collaboration with Better, the top AI-native homeownership firm. This partnership aims to increase availability of home equity loans.

data.title: Superior Court ruling: duBreton welcomes step toward a marketing framework aligned with organic and animal welfare certified pork
data.description: In Saint-Bernard, Quebec, duBreton expressed satisfaction with the ruling made by the Superior Court of Quebec on March 18, 2026. The court ordered Les Éleveurs de porcs du Québec to adhere to the directive from the Régie des marchés agricoles et alimentaires du Québec. This decision emphasizes the importance of upholding agricultural regulations.

data.title: NVIDIA unveils Proteina-Complexa AI model for drug discovery, with high binding affinities across 133 targets.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced a latest generative AI model that can create protein binders exhibiting nano- and picomolar binding affinities. This technology has been successfully confirmed across 133 targets through collaborations with pharmaceutical partners.

data.title: Carlisle Companies Publishes 2025 Annual Report
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) released its 2025 Annual Report showcasing strong financial performance, advancement in Vision 2030 goals, and notable strides in establishing an adaptable, company-wide innovation system. Chris Koch, the Chair, President, and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the achievements, stating that 2025 demonstrated significant headway in alignment with Vision 2030 despite economic challenges. The company reported total earnings of $5.0 billion for the year.

data.title: skinbetter science® Introduces Ampra Volumizing Macro HA Serum, a breakthrough in regenerative skincare to plump, lift, and contour
data.description: Ten years after developing the groundbreaking AlphaRet technology, skinbetter science has launched a new specialized formula to boost the effectiveness of hyaluronic acid in providing skin with increased volume and contour resembling that achieved with fillers. The company unveiled this innovation in Los Angeles on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Slime Licker® Season…Every Season!
data.description: Candy Dynamics has broadened its seasonal collection to align with evolving demographic trends in Indianapolis. On March 25, 2026, the company unveiled three new versions of the popular Slime Licker®, tailored for various occasions. This expansion caters to changing consumer preferences, indicating a strategic move by the company. The announcement signifies Candy Dynamics' commitment to keeping up with market demands and diversifying its product range.
